@graph.title: DirectionCosine
@graph.description: Identifiers for the cosine of the angle between two vectors in a three dimensional Euclidean space.
@graph.creator: Isabella Ruiz

@graph.definition: Projection of a vector along the first named axis of a coordinate system. Typically, the x-axis, but could be the R-axis for an RTN coordinate system.
Projection of a vector along the second named axis of a coordinate system. Typically, the y-axis, but could be the T-axis for an RTN coordinate system.
Projection of a vector along the third named axis of a coordinate system. Typically, the z-axis, but could be the N-axis for an RTN coordinate system.
